entry.title: New: RES26-069 (Honolulu) — CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT TO THE CITY OF LODGING, AIRFARE, AND PER DIEM VALUED AT AN ESTIMATED $2,066 FROM THE UNITED STATES ELECTION ASSISTANCE COMMISSION ("U.S. EAC") FOR THE OFFICE OF THE CITY CLERK'S ELECTION ADMINISTRATOR TO ATTEND THE EAC STANDARDS BOARD MEETING IN CHICAGO, ILLINOIS, FROM APRIL 16 TO APRIL 17, 2026.

Latest action: Adopted.

View on the council site
